product.name: Inbox Intelligence Product

threads.subject: Re: Following up on our discussion
threads.snippet: Hi Andriy, just wanted to circle back on what we discussed last Thursday. I've reviewed the proposal internally and have a few points I'd like to go over. Could we find 30 minutes next week?

threads.subject: Meeting request — Thursday 2pm
threads.snippet: Hey Andriy, are you available Thursday at 2pm CET for a quick sync on the integration timeline? I'd like to align on the Q3 deliverables before the steering committee next Monday.

calendar_context.conflict_note: Proposed meeting time overlaps with confirmed event

threads.subject: Partnership opportunity — data mesh tooling
threads.snippet: Hi Andriy, I came across your talk on data contracts at the Berlin meetup last month. We're building a data mesh platform and I think there could be interesting synergies. Would you be open to a 20-minute call?

threads.subject: Sprint review notes — data pipeline team
threads.snippet: Hi Andriy, attaching the sprint review notes from today's session. Key highlights: the ingestion pipeline migration is 80% complete, we identified a blocker on the schema registry integration. No action needed from you — just keeping you in the loop.

threads.subject: Quick question on data quality metrics
threads.snippet: Hi Andriy, we're setting up our data quality dashboard and I wanted to ask — which metrics do you recommend tracking for contract compliance? We're using Great Expectations but open to alternatives.

threads.subject: [RESOLVED] Pipeline delay — customer_events ingestion
threads.snippet: The customer_events ingestion pipeline delay has been resolved. Root cause: upstream API rate limiting. SLA impact: 47 minutes. No data loss.

threads.subject: Re: Technical scope for Phase 2
threads.snippet: Andriy, I've attached the updated requirements for Phase 2. The main change is the addition of real-time streaming, which Pierre flagged as a priority for the renewal. Let me know your thoughts.
